requirement_topic.en: Lighting EMC / Radio Disturbance — PNS CISPR 15 within BPS ICC Conformity
requirement_topic.zh: 照明 EMC / 无线电骚扰——BPS ICC 合格评定下的 PNS CISPR 15
requirement_topic.zht: 照明 EMC / 無線電騷擾——BPS ICC 合格評定下的 PNS CISPR 15

summary.en: Electromagnetic compatibility for lighting equipment in the Philippines is addressed through the Philippine National Standards adoption of CISPR 15 (PNS CISPR 15 / PNS IEC CISPR 15 — limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment), assessed as part of the BPS conformity scheme for products under the lighting technical regulation where EMC is within scope. Emission limits cover conducted disturbance on the mains terminals (150 kHz to 30 MHz) and radiated disturbance. Test reports must be from a laboratory recognised by BPS (typically ILAC MRA / ISO IEC 17025 accredited). EMC evidence forms part of the technical documentation supporting the Import Commodity Clearance (ICC) or PS licence. Where EMC is not separately mandated for a given lamp type, BPS still expects the product not to cause harmful interference.
summary.zh: 菲律宾照明设备的电磁兼容性通过将 CISPR 15 采用为菲律宾国家标准（PNS CISPR 15 / PNS IEC CISPR 15——电气照明及类似设备无线电骚扰特性的限值和测量方法）来处理，在 EMC 属于适用范围时，作为照明技术法规涵盖产品 BPS 合格评定方案的组成部分进行评估。发射限值涵盖电源端传导骚扰（150 kHz 至 30 MHz）及辐射骚扰。检测报告须来自 BPS 认可的实验室（通常为 ILAC MRA / ISO IEC 17025 认可）。EMC 证据是支持进口商品清关（ICC）或 PS 许可的技术文件的组成部分。对于特定灯型未单独强制 EMC 的情形，BPS 仍要求产品不得造成有害干扰。
summary.zht: 菲律賓照明設備的電磁兼容性通過將 CISPR 15 採用為菲律賓國家標準（PNS CISPR 15 / PNS IEC CISPR 15——電氣照明及類似設備無線電騷擾特性的限值和測量方法）來處理，在 EMC 屬於適用範圍時，作為照明技術法規涵蓋產品 BPS 合格評定方案的組成部分進行評估。發射限值涵蓋電源端傳導騷擾（150 kHz 至 30 MHz）及輻射騷擾。檢測報告須來自 BPS 認可的實驗室（通常為 ILAC MRA / ISO IEC 17025 認可）。EMC 證據是支持進口商品清關（ICC）或 PS 許可的技術文件的組成部分。對於特定燈型未單獨強制 EMC 的情形，BPS 仍要求產品不得造成有害干擾。

standards_or_laws: PNS CISPR 15 / PNS IEC CISPR 15 — Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment (as adopted by BPS)
BPS conformity scheme (ICC / PS) under the applicable lighting technical regulation — EMC within scope where mandated

summary.en: China's equivalent is GB 17743-2017 (Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment), technically aligned with CISPR 15. For luminaires sold in China, GB 17743 compliance is part of CCC certification (covering both safety and EMC for relevant categories), tested at CNAS / CMA-accredited laboratories. Chinese CCC EMC test reports are not automatically accepted in the Philippine BPS conformity scheme and may need to be reissued or re-tested by a BPS-recognised laboratory.
summary.zh: 中国对应标准为 GB 17743-2017（电气照明及类似设备的无线电骚扰特性的限值和测量方法），技术上与 CISPR 15 对齐。在中国销售的灯具须符合 GB 17743，这是相关类别 CCC 认证（涵盖安全和 EMC）的组成部分，在 CNAS / CMA 认可实验室检测。中国 CCC EMC 检测报告不会被菲律宾 BPS 合格评定方案自动接受，可能须由 BPS 认可实验室重新出具或重新检测。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準為 GB 17743-2017（電氣照明及類似設備的無線電騷擾特性的限值和測量方法），技術上與 CISPR 15 對齊。在中國銷售的燈具須符合 GB 17743，這是相關類別 CCC 認證（涵蓋安全和 EMC）的組成部分，在 CNAS / CMA 認可實驗室檢測。中國 CCC EMC 檢測報告不會被菲律賓 BPS 合格評定方案自動接受，可能須由 BPS 認可實驗室重新出具或重新檢測。

standards_or_laws: GB 17743-2017 — Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment (SAC/SAMR, aligned with CISPR 15)

gap.en: PNS CISPR 15 and GB 17743 are both derived from CISPR 15, so emission limits are largely harmonized and the underlying test data is often transferable in substance. The practical gaps are procedural: (1) EMC evidence must support the Philippine BPS ICC / PS file, and the test report must come from a BPS-recognised (typically ILAC MRA / ISO IEC 17025) laboratory — a China CCC EMC report may need to be re-issued or supplemented; (2) emissions must be demonstrated under 230 V 60 Hz supply conditions, not the China 220 V 50 Hz basis; (3) the conformity route (ICC per-shipment versus PS licence) determines how often EMC evidence is presented. Confirm with BPS whether EMC is separately required for the specific lamp/luminaire type or assessed only as part of the broader safety conformity.
gap.zh: PNS CISPR 15 与 GB 17743 均源自 CISPR 15，发射限值基本协调，底层检测数据在实质上常可转用。实际差距主要为程序性：（1）EMC 证据须支持菲律宾 BPS ICC / PS 文件，检测报告须来自 BPS 认可（通常为 ILAC MRA / ISO IEC 17025）实验室——中国 CCC EMC 报告可能须重新出具或补充；（2）发射须在 230 V 60 Hz 供电条件下证明，而非中国 220 V 50 Hz 基准；（3）合格评定路径（按批次的 ICC 与 PS 许可）决定 EMC 证据的提交频次。请向 BPS 确认特定灯/灯具类型是否单独要求 EMC，还是仅作为更广泛安全合格评定的组成部分进行评估。
gap.zht: PNS CISPR 15 與 GB 17743 均源自 CISPR 15，發射限值基本協調，底層檢測數據在實質上常可轉用。實際差距主要為程序性：（1）EMC 證據須支持菲律賓 BPS ICC / PS 文件，檢測報告須來自 BPS 認可（通常為 ILAC MRA / ISO IEC 17025）實驗室——中國 CCC EMC 報告可能須重新出具或補充；（2）發射須在 230 V 60 Hz 供電條件下證明，而非中國 220 V 50 Hz 基準；（3）合格評定路徑（按批次的 ICC 與 PS 許可）決定 EMC 證據的提交頻次。請向 BPS 確認特定燈/燈具類型是否單獨要求 EMC，還是僅作為更廣泛安全合格評定的組成部分進行評估。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional / within ICC-PS scope — lighting EMC is assessed via PNS CISPR 15 as part of the BPS conformity scheme where EMC is mandated for the product type; products must not cause harmful interference
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 17743-2017 compliance required as part of CCC certification for luminaires sold in China

source.publisher: Bureau of Philippine Standards (BPS), Department of Trade and Industry (DTI)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Lighting EMC in the Philippines is addressed through PNS CISPR 15 within the BPS ICC / PS conformity scheme where EMC is in scope for the product type. Limits are broadly harmonized with China GB 17743 (both CISPR 15-derived), but the test report must support the Philippine BPS file from a BPS-recognised laboratory and reflect 230 V 60 Hz supply, so a China CCC EMC report may need re-issuance or re-testing. Confirm with BPS whether EMC is separately mandated for the specific lamp/luminaire type.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 菲律宾照明 EMC 在 EMC 属于产品适用范围时，通过 BPS ICC / PS 合格评定方案下的 PNS CISPR 15 处理。限值与中国 GB 17743（均源自 CISPR 15）基本协调，但检测报告须由 BPS 认可实验室出具以支持菲律宾 BPS 文件，并反映 230 V 60 Hz 供电，因此中国 CCC EMC 报告可能须重新出具或重新检测。请向 BPS 确认特定灯/灯具类型是否单独强制 EMC。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 菲律賓照明 EMC 在 EMC 屬於產品適用範圍時，通過 BPS ICC / PS 合格評定方案下的 PNS CISPR 15 處理。限值與中國 GB 17743（均源自 CISPR 15）基本協調，但檢測報告須由 BPS 認可實驗室出具以支持菲律賓 BPS 文件，並反映 230 V 60 Hz 供電，因此中國 CCC EMC 報告可能須重新出具或重新檢測。請向 BPS 確認特定燈/燈具類型是否單獨強制 EMC。

requirement_topic.en: NTC Type Approval / Type Acceptance for Smart (Wireless) LED Luminaires
requirement_topic.zh: 智能（无线）LED 灯具的 NTC 型号核准 / 型号认可
requirement_topic.zht: 智能（無線）LED 燈具的 NTC 型號核准 / 型號認可

summary.en: Smart LED luminaires with built-in radio functions (Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, Zigbee, or other RF) are radio-communications equipment under Philippine law and require type approval or type acceptance from the National Telecommunications Commission (NTC) before import, sale, or use. The applicant (usually the in-country importer) submits the radio test report, frequency and power particulars, and equipment details; the device must operate within NTC-authorised frequency bands and power limits. Short-range devices in licence-exempt bands still require NTC registration/type acceptance. This is in addition to the BPS ICC / PS safety clearance and the DOE energy label — the radio module triggers a separate regulator. Test reports are typically to the relevant IEC / ETSI / FCC-equivalent RF standards recognised by NTC.
summary.zh: 内置无线功能（Wi-Fi、蓝牙、Zigbee 或其他射频）的智能 LED 灯具在菲律宾法律下属于无线电通信设备，须在进口、销售或使用前取得国家电信委员会（NTC）的型号核准或型号认可。申请人（通常为本地进口商）提交射频检测报告、频率及功率参数及设备详情；设备须在 NTC 授权的频段及功率限值内运行。免许可频段内的短距离设备仍须进行 NTC 注册/型号认可。此为 BPS ICC / PS 安全清关及 DOE 能效标签之外的额外要求——射频模块触发独立监管机构。检测报告通常依据 NTC 认可的相关 IEC / ETSI / FCC 等效射频标准。
summary.zht: 內置無線功能（Wi-Fi、藍牙、Zigbee 或其他射頻）的智能 LED 燈具在菲律賓法律下屬於無線電通信設備，須在進口、銷售或使用前取得國家電信委員會（NTC）的型號核准或型號認可。申請人（通常為本地進口商）提交射頻檢測報告、頻率及功率參數及設備詳情；設備須在 NTC 授權的頻段及功率限值內運行。免許可頻段內的短距離設備仍須進行 NTC 註冊/型號認可。此為 BPS ICC / PS 安全清關及 DOE 能效標籤之外的額外要求——射頻模塊觸發獨立監管機構。檢測報告通常依據 NTC 認可的相關 IEC / ETSI / FCC 等效射頻標準。

standards_or_laws: National Telecommunications Commission (NTC) type approval / type acceptance — radio equipment authorisation (Philippines)
NTC Memorandum Circulars on short-range devices and type approval of radio communications equipment

summary.en: In China, a smart luminaire with wireless functionality requires SRRC (State Radio Regulation of China) type approval / radio transmission equipment type approval before sale, covering frequency, bandwidth, and power. SRRC approval is separate from CCC. SRRC and the Philippine NTC are different national radio regulators with no mutual recognition — an SRRC approval does not authorise the device for use in the Philippines.
summary.zh: 在中国，具备无线功能的智能灯具须在销售前取得 SRRC（国家无线电管理）型号核准 / 无线电发射设备型号核准，涵盖频率、带宽及功率。SRRC 核准独立于 CCC。SRRC 与菲律宾 NTC 为不同国家的无线电监管机构，不存在互认——SRRC 核准不构成对该设备在菲律宾使用的授权。
summary.zht: 在中國，具備無線功能的智能燈具須在銷售前取得 SRRC（國家無線電管理）型號核准 / 無線電發射設備型號核准，涵蓋頻率、帶寬及功率。SRRC 核准獨立於 CCC。SRRC 與菲律賓 NTC 為不同國家的無線電監管機構，不存在互認——SRRC 核准不構成對該設備在菲律賓使用的授權。

standards_or_laws: SRRC type approval — radio transmission equipment type approval (China, MIIT/SRRC)

gap.en: A smart LED luminaire triggers a second Philippine regulator (NTC) that has no China analogue beyond SRRC, and SRRC and NTC do not recognise each other. Chinese manufacturers exporting smart luminaires must: (1) ensure the radio module operates within NTC-authorised bands and power limits — Chinese band/power settings tuned for China regulation may not match the Philippine allocation; (2) obtain NTC type approval / type acceptance via the in-country importer before import or sale; (3) supply RF test reports to NTC-recognised standards (the SRRC report alone is not accepted). This is in addition to BPS ICC / PS safety and the DOE energy label. Selling a wireless luminaire without NTC authorisation is an offence even if BPS and DOE requirements are met.
gap.zh: 智能 LED 灯具触发菲律宾的第二个监管机构（NTC），其在中国除 SRRC 外无对应机构，且 SRRC 与 NTC 互不认可。出口智能灯具的中国制造商须：（1）确保射频模块在 NTC 授权的频段及功率限值内运行——按中国法规调校的中国频段/功率设置可能与菲律宾分配不符；（2）通过本地进口商在进口或销售前取得 NTC 型号核准 / 型号认可；（3）向 NTC 提供符合其认可标准的射频检测报告（仅 SRRC 报告不被接受）。此为 BPS ICC / PS 安全及 DOE 能效标签之外的额外要求。即便满足 BPS 及 DOE 要求，未取得 NTC 授权销售无线灯具仍属违法。
gap.zht: 智能 LED 燈具觸發菲律賓的第二個監管機構（NTC），其在中國除 SRRC 外無對應機構，且 SRRC 與 NTC 互不認可。出口智能燈具的中國製造商須：（1）確保射頻模塊在 NTC 授權的頻段及功率限值內運行——按中國法規調校的中國頻段/功率設置可能與菲律賓分配不符；（2）通過本地進口商在進口或銷售前取得 NTC 型號核准 / 型號認可；（3）向 NTC 提供符合其認可標準的射頻檢測報告（僅 SRRC 報告不被接受）。此為 BPS ICC / PS 安全及 DOE 能效標籤之外的額外要求。即便滿足 BPS 及 DOE 要求，未取得 NTC 授權銷售無線燈具仍屬違法。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for wireless luminaires — NTC type approval / type acceptance required before import, sale, or use of smart LED luminaires with radio functions; separate from BPS and DOE
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for wireless luminaires — SRRC type approval required for radio transmission equipment in China; separate from CCC

source.publisher: National Telecommunications Commission (NTC), Republic of the Philippines

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Smart LED luminaires with Wi-Fi / Bluetooth / other radio functions require NTC type approval / type acceptance in the Philippines, separate from and in addition to the BPS ICC / PS safety clearance and the DOE energy label. China SRRC approval does not transfer — SRRC and NTC are independent regulators. Verify that the radio module operates within NTC-authorised bands and power limits and obtain NTC authorisation via the in-country importer before import or sale.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 含 Wi-Fi / 蓝牙 / 其他无线功能的智能 LED 灯具在菲律宾须取得 NTC 型号核准 / 型号认可，独立于并附加于 BPS ICC / PS 安全清关及 DOE 能效标签。中国 SRRC 核准不可转用——SRRC 与 NTC 为独立监管机构。请核实射频模块在 NTC 授权频段及功率限值内运行，并在进口或销售前通过本地进口商取得 NTC 授权。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 含 Wi-Fi / 藍牙 / 其他無線功能的智能 LED 燈具在菲律賓須取得 NTC 型號核准 / 型號認可，獨立於並附加於 BPS ICC / PS 安全清關及 DOE 能效標籤。中國 SRRC 核准不可轉用——SRRC 與 NTC 為獨立監管機構。請核實射頻模塊在 NTC 授權頻段及功率限值內運行，並在進口或銷售前通過本地進口商取得 NTC 授權。
